apiTokenError.title: API Token Required
apiTokenError.subtitle: Configuration error - Please set up your API token
apiTokenError.description: The application requires an API token to communicate with the backend service. This token must be configured in your environment variables.

step1.title: Open the .env file
step1.description: Locate the .env file in the root directory of your project.

step2.title: Add your API token
step2.description: Add or update the VITE_API_TOKEN variable with your API token:

step3.title: Restart the development server
step3.description: Stop and restart your development server for the changes to take effect.

errorBoundary.title: Oops! Something went wrong
errorBoundary.subtitle: An unexpected error occurred in the application
errorBoundary.persistsMessage: If the problem persists, please contact support or try again later.

userList.title: Users
userList.searchLabel: Search users by name or email
userList.noUsersDescription: No users were found. Start by creating your first user.
userList.noResultsDescription: No users match your search. Try different terms.

deleteDialog.title: Confirm deletion
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete

toast.userCreated: User created successfully. Note: This is a test API, the user has not been actually saved.
toast.userUpdated: User updated successfully. Note: This is a test API, the changes have not been actually saved.
toast.userDeleted: User deleted successfully. Note: This is a test API, the user has not been actually deleted.

errors.rateLimitMessage: You have reached the public API request limit. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
errors.rateLimitAction: Visit ReqRes to get an API key
